title: Enumerate Domain Users
html:
Enumerate Domain Users

Enumerate domain users on the remote target

nxc smb <CIDR> -u <USERNAME> -p <PASSWORD> --users

Export domain users on the remote target

nxc smb <ip> -u <USERNAME> -p <PASSWORD> --users-export output.txt
excerpt: Enumerate Domain Users Enumerate domain users on the remote target nxc smb <CIDR> -u <USERNAME> -p <PASSWORD> --users Export domain users on the remote target nxc smb <ip> -u &
